tagged_story_for_tts:
Now I will teach you phone.<[silence:400]>

It is a flat rock-smooth stone, small like your hand, that holds voices inside—like when you cup ears to hear far-off tribe but without shouting.<[silence:400]> You press its face with finger-taps (like poking fire-ember patterns), and it glows with tiny sun-marks that change when you touch.<[silence:400]> If you hold it to ear, a ghost-voice speaks—maybe hunter at big-water, maybe mate at berry-bush—no smoke, no drum, just sound in hand.<[silence:400]> It eats hidden lightning (like sky-strike trapped in a nut) and dies if not fed from a black vine.<[silence:400]> Drop it on rock? Crack—now it’s dumb as any other stone.<[silence:400]>
clean_story:
Now I will teach you phone.

It is a flat rock-smooth stone, small like your hand, that holds voices inside—like when you cup ears to hear far-off tribe but without shouting. You press its face with finger-taps (like poking fire-ember patterns), and it glows with tiny sun-marks that change when you touch. If you hold it to ear, a ghost-voice speaks—maybe hunter at big-water, maybe mate at berry-bush—no smoke, no drum, just sound in hand. It eats hidden lightning (like sky-strike trapped in a nut) and dies if not fed from a black vine. Drop it on rock? Crack—now it’s dumb as any other stone.
